name: AI Companion
description: An autonomous companion for Minecraft that navigates, gathers, crafts, builds, and fights on its own — driven by any OpenAI-compatible LLM. Run it fully local and private with llama.cpp, or point it at a hosted frontier model (xAI, OpenAI, …) for maximum capability. Self-contained: bundles a forked PlayerEngine (Automatone + ChatClef).
